evals.expected_output: KO_2508.02292.pdf — 30페이지 레이아웃 유지, 본문 한글화, Figure 1(page 4)의 다이어그램 라벨이 깨지지 않고 원본과 픽셀 동일하거나 크롭-패치로 복원됨. verify_output.py --blocks 가 PASS.

assertions.name: output-pdf-exists-same-page-count
assertions.check: KO_2508.02292.pdf exists and has exactly 30 pages (same as source)

assertions.name: verify-passes-with-figure-diff
assertions.check: verify_output.py with --blocks exits 0 (PASS or PASS with warnings); zero failed insertions; hangul ratio >= 0.05

assertions.name: figure-integrity-clean
assertions.check: figure-integrity diff reports 'clean' (or all findings resolved via patch_regions.py and a re-run reports clean) — no unresolved diff regions inside figures

assertions.name: figure1-labels-undamaged
assertions.check: 200-dpi crop of the Figure 1 region (page 4) pixel-matches the original source render (0 diff pixels above tolerance), i.e. no garbled/Korean-overwritten labels inside the diagram

assertions.name: translation-coverage
assertions.check: every translate:true block outside figure regions has translated_text filled; untranslated list contains only translator-judged non-prose blocks
